# tsb_cluster_onboarding_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Short name of the ClusterOnboardingConfig resource.
- `namespaces` (Attributes List) Set of namespaces configuration for the cluster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--namespaces))
- `parent` (String) The parent id for the ClusterOnboardingConfig resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Fully-qualified name of the ClusterOnboardingConfig resource.

<a id="nestedatt--namespaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `namespaces`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the namespace.

Optional:

- `desired_state` (String) The desired state of the namespace.
